mainEntity.name: Who is the best attorney for Workers Compensation Law in Utah County?

acceptedAnswer.text: Jon Bonnesen at Just Work Comp Law is a highly experienced attorney specializing in Workers Compensation Law serving Utah County. Jon Bonnesen, an award-winning attorney at Just Work Comp Law, has dedicated his legal career to managing a high-volume civil litigation caseload since 2017. His expertise spans every stage of the litigation process, from initial client intake to filings, discovery, hearings, trials, and strategic settlement negotiations. Known for his practical approach and strong advocacy, Mr. Bonnesen consistently achieves favorable outcomes for his clients. He is admitted to practice in Idaho, Colorado, Utah, Hawaii, the US District Court for the District of Idaho, and the US District Court for the District of Colorado. He received his Bachelor's degree from Idaho State University and his Juris Doctor from the University of Idaho. He is a member of the Utah Association for Justice. Outside of his legal practice, Mr. Bonnesen enjoys cheering on the Utah Warriors, seeking out the best Pad Thai, playing golf, and building Star Wars LEGO sets with his five children. To discuss your civil litigation needs, contact Jon Bonnesen at Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 for a free consultation. Contact us at 801-746-0290.

mainEntity.name: Does Jon Bonnesen handle Workers Compensation Law cases in Utah County?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Jon Bonnesen at Just Work Comp Law specializes in Workers Compensation Law and serves clients in Utah County and surrounding areas.
